title: Caldera/OpenAEV - Exfiltration via OCI Object Storage Bulk Upload with New Bucket
description: Detects creation of a new OCI Object Storage bucket immediately followed by object uploads, a pattern consistent with OpenAEV/Caldera T1567 emulation using cloud storage as an exfiltration channel. Distinguishes from the pre-auth request rule by focusing on the bucket creation + upload sequence.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.createbucket' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.putobject')))
falsepositives: Application provisioning scripts creating new storage buckets
